task_completion.description: The Sygic GPS Navigation application is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic app interface, logo, or map screen is visible in the screenshots.

task_completion.description: The contact 'Dr. Hameed' is searched for or selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Dr. Hameed' is visible in the Sygic search bar, or the contact is selected from a list within the app.

task_completion.description: The address 'Jalalabad' is selected as the destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Jalalabad' is displayed as the target destination in the route planning or search results screen.

task_completion.description: The route overview or active navigation screen is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map showing a highlighted route line from the starting location to Jalalabad, along with navigation UI elements like an ETA or a 'Start' button.

task_completion.description: The calculated route shows the expected distance to the destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The route overview screen displays a total distance between 120 km and 170 km (approximately 150 km).

integrity.description: The agent used the Sygic GPS Navigation app, not an alternative mapping service.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI must clearly belong to Sygic, not Google Maps, Waze, or a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GUI rather than using terminal commands to spoof the navigation state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, adb shell commands, or script editors should be visible completing the task.

integrity.description: The route overview is a genuine calculated route within the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows a fully rendered map with a route line and distance/ETA, rather than just a text search result or a static image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target contact is 'Dr. Hameed' and the destination is 'Jalalabad', a real city in Afghanistan. The starting location is Kabul, so a correctly calculated route in Sygic will show a driving distance between 120 km and 170 km (approximately 150 km).
